title: Vanilla Vintage VR by 9B
description:
It's a collection of minecraft mods specifically for use with vanilla servers on v1.21.3.

"A return to the roots. A curated collection of modifications… meticulously crafted to evoke the spirit of a bygone age."
body:
# Featuring:
- Optional VR Support
- Full Controller Support
- World Map & Minimap
- Increased View Distance
- 1st/3rd Person Models, Animations, and 3d Skins/Models
- Particle Effects (Falling Leaves, Dusts, Fireflys, Etc)
- Know what kind of block your looking at
- Remastered Ambient Sounds and Sound Physics
- An App Store for Additional Resource Packs + Shaders

##      Resource Packs:
        Alacrity
        Better Flame Particles
        Even Better Enchants
        Fancy Crops
        Fresh Animations
        New Glowing Ores
        Stoneborn
        RAY's 3D Ladders & 3D Rails

##      Shader Packs:
- ComplementaryUnbound r5.3
- Photon v1.0a

##      Mod List:
